title: dynamic workdoc title when creating from a template
excerpt: We need the ability to dynamically name a workdoc when creating from a template. Usually a workdoc is named the same as the line item, but when we create or generate from a template we need to be able to rename it automa…

posts.author: Majalin (Majalin Tiu)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need the ability to dynamically name a workdoc when creating from a template. Usually a workdoc is named the same as the line item, but when we create or generate from a template we need to be able to rename it automatically.

Is there any solution available like this?
